nodes.label: Integrated Intelligence Ingestion and Time Fabric Design
nodes.norm_label: integrated intelligence ingestion and time fabric design

nodes.label: Hybrid MLA Roster Plan
nodes.rationale: Goal is to replace generated/fake 17th Assembly MLA data with a source-labeled ECI-first roster.

nodes.label: Integrated Intelligence Ingestion Plan
nodes.rationale: Extends existing app with local SQLite evidence warehouse, Newspaper/Scrapy adapters, clustered event extraction from 1952 onward, and snapshots.

nodes.label: Hybrid MLA Roster Design Spec
nodes.rationale: Design decisions call for official ECI as primary source of truth, secondary sources for enrichment only, and rendering unsourced fields as unavailable.

nodes.label: Integrated Intelligence Ingestion Spec
nodes.rationale: Ensures complete raw item storage as evidence, clustering duplicates, 1952+ coverage scope, SQLite DB engine, and atomic compatibility snapshots.
